myReports.heading: My reports

workspace.backToReportsAria: Go back to the list of my report drafts

hunterWriter.title: Designated step writer
hunterWriter.current: Step edits and submissions are restricted to: {{name}}.
hunterWriter.youAreWriter: You are the designated writer — you can edit and submit steps.
hunterWriter.readOnly: Only « {{name}} » can edit and submit steps. Ask them to hand off using the selector below, or ask a program coordinator.
hunterWriter.coHunterReadOnly: You are not the designated writer — you cannot edit or submit steps. Ask the current writer to hand off to you, or ask a program coordinator.

qcSubmissions.filteredSubheading: Hunter submissions and super-admin feedback for this draft only.
qcSubmissions.superAdminSectionHint: Read-only — the hunter then fixes step by step or requests full validation.
qcSubmissions.globalRevisionTableHint: Requests issued by super-admin. Open a report to read the draft and comments.
qcSubmissions.emptyFiltered: No hunter submissions for this report.
qcSubmissions.globalRevisionOnReportHint: A super-admin global revision is open on this report.

awaitingReviewers.short: Global submit #{{revision}} — awaiting QC and super-admin.

partiallyApproved.short: Approved by QC or SA (#{{revision}}) — global resubmit available.

globalSubmissionReview.hint: Approve the global revision (not final report validation). Super-admin validates the report separately.
globalSubmissionReview.alreadyDecided: This global submission has already been decided.
globalSubmissionReview.readOnlyClosedCycle: Global revision cycle is closed (read-only). Use final validation when the draft is ready to submit.
globalSubmissionReview.superAdminReportHint: After approving the global revision, validate the report (or request another global revision) from
globalSubmissionReview.hunterFeedbackHint: Revision #{{revision}} — fix then submit globally again.

globalRevisionReview.readOnlyHint: Read-only — latest state of the draft (all steps), as currently saved.

teamReports.heading: Team reports
teamReports.subheading: One card per team report. Open a card to see submissions and super-admin feedback for that draft only.

finalStep.awaitingLeadValidation: Last step validated: awaiting final validation.
finalStep.globalRevisionInProgress: Global revision in progress — see the “Super-admin feedback” tab.

globalSubmit.hint: Sends every step still editable to the quality checker in one action.
globalSubmit.disabledNone: All steps are already submitted or approved.

superAdminFeedback.empty: No super-admin feedback on this report yet.

myReports.subheading: Track every vulnerability report you're currently drafting and where it stands in the review pipeline.
